easy.title: Fix Layout with box-sizing
easy.description: A two-column layout is broken because padding adds to element width. Fix it by applying box-sizing: border-box so the columns sit side by side within the 400px container.
easy.starterCode:
Column 1
Column 2
easy.solution:
Column 1
Column 2

medium.title: Calculate and Fix Total Element Width
medium.description: Given a content-box element with width, padding, border, and margin, calculate the total width it occupies. Then apply box-sizing: border-box and adjust the CSS so the element is exactly 300px total (content + padding + border) with the same visual appearance.
medium.starterCode: This box has width: 300px with content-box. Padding and border add to its total size.
medium.solution: This box now uses border-box so 300px includes padding and border.

hard.title: Debug Box Model Issues in a Complex Layout
hard.description: A card grid layout has multiple box model issues: cards overflow their container, inline elements don't respect dimensions, and margins collapse unexpectedly. Fix all issues by applying the correct box model principles.
